description.html:
Description

Designed for outdoor installations, the Econo Feather Flag stands 16 feet tall. The top of the graphic has a free edge that flutters with the wind and creates eye-catching movement.
This large flag comes with a brushed aluminum pole set and ground stake for use in planters and soft ground. The dye sublimated flags are printed direct to the material creating a "print thru" graphic which can be seen on the front and back.
Available in single side only. Standard flags have the pole sleeve to the left of the graphic, reversed flags have the pole sleeve on the right.

Applications Outdoor ready: Popular for storefronts, outdoor events - graphic flutters in windy conditions

description.html:
Description

Feather Angled Flags tower over the competition—take advertising to new heights with these full color skyscrapers. With several base options they can be displayed indoors and outdoors.

Our mesh flag polyester is direct printed and then sublimated. This creates "Print thru" for single sided flags; full color and vibrant on the front - muted and mirrored but legible when viewed from the back.

  • Single sided Print Thru flag graphic with black nylon pole sleeve to the left of the print when viewed from the front
  • Single sided Print Thru Reverse flag graphic with black nylon pole sleeve to the right of the print when viewed from the front
  • Double Sided separate flag graphics are sewn back to back with a silver block out layer in between

The standard ground stake can be used to install in soft ground, while the cross base or square base are heavy duty for hard surface staging. The optional carry bag is great for when you plan to travel with or store your flag.

Applications
Suitable for both indoor and outdoor settings, ideal for storefronts, tradeshows, outdoor events, and festivals.

Installation Guide

Step 1: Connect the two poles labeled #A-B by joining the B-B ends. Repeat with bottom poles #C-D. Extend telescopic ends A.

Step 2: Take vertical pole #A-C and insert end C into the pole socket in the base. From the bottom of the base thread hexbolt into end C and tighten.

Step 4: Use the black handled thumb screws to secure the horizontal poles to the vertical poles.

Description

Our custom pole flags can transform your logo or artwork into a dynamic flying reality. Our flags are direct printed to our lightweight open weave flag material, this allows for ink penetration and creates "Print thru" graphics.

  • Single Sided Print Thru graphics are vivid full color on the front but still visible and often legible from the back.

  • Double Sided flags are two graphics sewn back to back with an interior blockout layer.

Whether you are flying your flag on a pole or simply hanging it in your room, we offer two types of finishing to accommodate your display needs.

Please see below for details.

Optional Pole and Bracket: For flags with a height less than 36"

The Flag Pole and Bracket Kit is perfect for those wishing to display their Custom Pole Flag. Buy the pole or the bracket separately, or as a set.

The bracket has two positions for displaying the pole, horizontal or angled upwards.

The tangle free pole has a top section that spins on ball bearings, this will increase the life of your flag and keep the flag from getting twisted on the pole. Also included are clips to secure the flag into place and a plastic ring for use with grommets.

description.html:
Description

20x20ft custom trade show booth 05 kit is portable and easy to set up, being an ideal solution that you must configure at any public event. Signwin Display, a company that focuses on trade show displays, will help you out to achieve the goal by creating a unique, eye-catching medium to attract potential customers. Implementation of colorful designs and models could make passersby curious about your brand and the products you want to introduce. Don’t be shy to pour any ideas into making your own unique displays. Signwin Display will help you out in case you don’t have any original design with you. Feel free to contact us and choose the trade show display options you want.

This kit is affordable and customizable. The frame is made of durable and lightweight aluminum tubes, which are tied together with elastic cords for easy installation. Your artwork is custom printed on the stretch fabric through our dye sublimation process. This produces a vivid high-resolution graphic that can be slid onto the frame pillowcase. The bottom edge is closed with a strong zipper, which can be tightened to create a professional, wrinkle-free, and eye-catching finish. In around 10 minutes, your displays will be ready.

  • Quick melt - Cold Peel
  • Sizes up to 22" x 120"
  • File requirements: PNG w/transparent background (300dpi recommended)

description.html:
Description

Direct to Film printing is the latest trend in printing. Full color graphics are printed on a transfer film, then using a heat press the print is transferred onto a final product. The process is superior to DTG printing as it can be done on polyester blends as well as cotton, and the prints aren’t as thick as Plastisol prints giving a softer feel. DTF can even be used on products that used to be limited to cut and weeded graphics like hats, tote bags, virtually any fabric product.

White ink is available on our transfers, allowing for contoured graphics. The graphics are backed with a flood white so they work on light and dark garments. The transfers are stable and can be stored for later use allowing you to print now and apply on demand!

Spec

Print

  • Cold Peel Transfer Film
  • 5/0 (CMYK + White ink)
  • White melt adhesive

File Instructions

We only accept PNG files for this product.
Artwork should be submitted with transparent backgrounds.

  • PNG Only
  • File must be transparent background
  • Require ⅛” safety margin along all edges to avoid print cut off in trimming
  • Gang up designs on your artboard to utilize the square footage price (e.g. repeat the same design on the artboard to maximize cost)
  • 5/0 color printing
  • Max size 22” x 120”
  • Transfers will be trimmed to ordered size
  • Minimum detail size – Uploaded artwork should not contain elements smaller than 0.02 inch(0.5 mm). Fine details below this threshold may result in printing or adhesion issues during application.

Pressing Instructions

Our DTF is a cold peel film. Heat, pressure, and time should be adjusted according to individual machines and substrates. The following are general recommendations for reference only.

  • Pressure: 35-50 PSI
  • Pre-Press: 5-7 seconds until moisture is gone
  • Press: 290-320℉ 10-20 seconds
  • Post-Press: 5-7 seconds with a teflon sheet or other preferred material

  • Instant Adhesion - No Heating Necessary

description.html:
Description

The latest in UV DTF technology unlocks your ability to offer 1000s of customized products. Popular for use on mugs, coasters, awards and much much more. These DTF printed decals are vibrant and durable with excellent adhesion. Peel and stick application is done in no time at all. Ink creates textured raised surface compared to dye sublimated products. Submit a gang sheet of designs for maximum savings. Product includes CMYK + White printing so a PNG file with a transparent background is required, 300ppi is recommended for the highest quality results. The DTF decals can be installed via wet application for easy placement and temporary repositioning.

Spec

  • UV DTF Film with white carrier sheet
  • 5/0 (CMYK + White Ink)
  • Instant Adhesion
  • Print Size Maximum: 22.5" x 120"

File Instructions

We only accept PNG files for this product.
Artwork should be submitted with transparent backgrounds.

  • PNG Only
  • File must be transparent background
  • Require ⅛” safety margin along all edges to avoid print cut off in trimming
  • Gang up designs on your artboard to utilize the square footage price (e.g. repeat the same design on the artboard to maximize cost)
  • 5/0 color printing
  • Max size 22” x 120”
  • Transfers will be trimmed to ordered size
  • Minimum detail size – Uploaded artwork should not contain elements smaller than 0.02 inch(0.5 mm). Fine details below this threshold may result in printing or adhesion issues during application.

Pressing Instructions

  • Prep the application area - Clean using soap and water (recommended), if using 50/50 alcohol and water mix thoroughly remove cleanser or adhesion might be affected.
  • Squeegee - After cutting out your design from your sheet, place your design adhesive side up and run a soft squeegee over the print, this will secure your print to the film and will be easier to pull off the carrier sheet without issue.
  • Peel the carrier sheet - Carefully detach the white carrier sheet from the white adhesive side. Taking care that small elements and lines all stay attached to the film and the carrier sheet comes away clean.
  • Place sticker on item - Small graphics maybe applied all at once using both hands to place, please line up accurately as the adhesive is very aggressive. Large graphics might be best applied via a hinge method similar to adhesive vinyl exposing a small portion of the adhesive to tack and hinge the application, once properly aligned the rest of the carrier sheet can be removed.
  • Complete transfer - With the film still in place firmly squeegee or burnish the design onto the item making sure to get the entire print secured. Start peeling the film watching closely for any areas that might not release from the film and lifting from the item. If areas are lifting stop peeling, and squeegee again until adhered, squeegee from multiple angles for best adhesion.
  • Wet application - UV decals can be applied using a wet application. Use application fluid or water with a few drops of dish soap. This process can be more forgiving than dry installations as the adhesion of these decals is permanent and trying to lift a misplaced decal will likely result in tearing.
